mapper.select:
SELECT A.CODE_ID, A.CODE, A.CODE_NM, A.USE_AT FROM acm_code_sub A, acm_code_mst B WHERE B.USE_AT = 'Y' AND A.CODE_ID = B.CODE_ID
AND A.CODE_ID LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchKeyword},'%')
AND A.CODE LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchKeyword},'%')
AND A.CODE_NM LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchKeyword},'%')
LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM acm_code_sub A, acm_code_mst B WHERE B.USE_AT = 'Y' AND A.CODE_ID = B.CODE_ID
AND A.CODE_ID LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchKeyword},'%')
AND A.CODE LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchKeyword},'%')
AND A.CODE_NM LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchKeyword},'%')
